titleStmt.title: SII 30.210: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 210. (A.R. No. 285-A of 1915.) Vikravāṇḍi, Villuppuram Taluk, South Arcot District. Bhuvanēśvara temple-on the north, west and south walls of the central shrine 12th c. A.D.

summary.p: Fragments. The first one, record the steps taken by certain Karuvuṇṇayakar and Araisukkaḍiyār to compensate the loss of certain copper utensils (seppukkiḍāram and seppukkuḍam) of this temple, which were originally gifted by the queen. The second one records the gift of 20 kāsu for burning two perpetual lamps in that temple. This gift was received by the Śivabrāhmaṇās and they undertook the responsibility of burning those lamps.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: ṟku yāṇṭu Āvatu kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻa vaḷaṉāṭṭu puṟaiyūrnāṭṭu nakaram puvaṉimāṇikkapurattuc cetikulacin=tāmaṇi Īśvaramuṭaiya mahādeva ḻvāriṭṭa ceppukkiṭāramuñ ceppukkuṭamuṅ keṭṭamaiyil Ikkoyilukku śrīmāheśvarañ ceykiṟa karuvuṇāyakarum Araicukkaṭiyārum Ikkoyilil civabrāhmaṇaraitta

ṇam mutalāṉa kācu 2 10 Ikkācu Irupatum Ikkoyilil kāṇiuṭaiya civabrāhmaṇarom kaikkoṇṭu Itdevaṟku Erikka kaṭavomāṉa tirunan=tā viḷakku 2 cantrādittavaṟ cella Erikkak kaṭavomānom Ikkoyilil civabrāhmaṇarom Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 30.210 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
